← All charges

K2 & Mwala Crushing Elephant Charge 2014

25 October 2014 · 📍 Kawanga

Results Checkpoints Awards Grants 🗺 Map

Conservation Grants

Funds distributed to conservation organisations from the 2014 charge.

Organisation Amount (ZMW) Purpose
Children in the Wilderness 28,027 Support school stays in parks for conservation education
Chipembele Wildlife Education Trust 22,422 Covering costs of logistics and materials for on site conservation education program
Conservation Lake Tanganyika 22,422 Purchase of wet weather patrol equipment & support of ongoing marine patrol costs
Conservation Lower Zambezi 28,027 Environmental Education Programme support
Conservation South Luangwa 39,238 Annual Conservation Fun Run & Sports Day, anti-snaring/patrols
Game Rangers International 28,027 Towards community conservation education, including popular local radio programs
Kasanka Trust 28,027 Building a bridge over the Musola River near the Bat Forest to provide all year access to a sensitive area
Teachers Conservation Manual and Student Activity Books 74,740 Print & distribution of conservation cirriculum designed by NLCP and London Zoo
Wildlife & Environmental Conservation Society of Zambia 132,663 Support 867 Chongololo clubs and 26,010 members
Zambian Carnivore Programme 14,015 Supporting Conservation Biologist Training, Conservation Clubs, de-snaring of carnivores
Total 417,048
Elephant Charge results archive — data updated annually after each event.
